lore.english:
Taimanin, the butler of the Fuuma clan, and a teacher of Gosha Academy.

She is a daughter whom Fuuma Danjo had with his mistress, which makes her Fuuma Kotaro's stepsister. She is a talented Taimanin who calls Fuuma Kotaro "Master" and supports him in every way. When the Fuuma clan was in danger of collapsing after losing the battle against Taimanins led by the Igawa clan, she did her best to have Fuuma Kotaro succeed and continue to lead the clan, then became his guardian at only 11 years old.

Inheriting the characteristic of the Fuuma clan, she uses the ninja art of Evil Eye. Unlike other Evil Eye abilities, her "Clairvoyance" is activated by closing her eye, which lets her spy on anywhere she wants without the need to physically move. She can secretly gather info from books or computers with her ninja art.

Also, she is known to be the best at using a kunai among the Fuuma clan, and can even hit hidden targets using her Evil Eye with pinpoint accuracy.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Fuuma Martial Art: Soaring Swallow[-]
skills.description:
Throws a kunai 3 times at the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Restraint] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:280102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:280102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Evil Eye: Clairvoyance[-]
skills.description:
Uses Clairvoyance to grant a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:280201]%)[-] [&AtkUp] to 1 ally.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:280201] turn(s)
Reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of all affected ally skills by [V2:280202] turn(s).
If the affected ally is an [&Color_Yellow]Agility type[-], additionally grants [&DeBuffBlock].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:280203] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Clairvoyance: Hyakki Yakou[-]
skills.description:
Tokiko summons numerous kunai, dealing damage to all enemies 4 times.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:280303]%)[-] [&Weaken]  at a [&Color_Cyan][R:280303]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:280303] turn(s)
Additionally, grants [&BuffBlock] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:280302]%[-] chance.
